category_sources: Official Levien libart page says Libart is a library for high-performance 2D graphics.
source_facts.description says library for high-performance 2D graphics.
display_name_sources: Official Levien documentation uses the display name Libart.
docs_sources: Official Levien libart page is the best project documentation surface found.
Official Levien vector paths page documents libart data structures.
repo_sources: Official source archive is GNOME-hosted, but no official source-control repository URL was confirmed; source_facts.homepage points to an unrelated Adaptive Radix Tree project and was not used as repo evidence.
tags_sources: Official Levien documentation describes vector paths and a 2D graphics imaging model.
